slides.title: Overview
slides.content: Speed matters. Module 2 removes the tutorial guardrails — you execute the full DTID kill chain without prompting. The Lone Wolf scenario gives you a single target and a ticking clock. Hesitation is the enemy.

slides.title: Learning Objectives
content: Execute the full DTID kill chain without prompting
Use the Radial Action Wheel efficiently
Operate NEXUS protocol manipulation (1/2 → 2/2 state progression)
Select between RF jamming and NEXUS based on situational factors
Monitor the event log and track list simultaneously
Interpret the debrief score by category

slides.title: Key Concepts
content: Defeat modes: HOLD vs. LAND NOW vs. DEAFEN
Effector recharge cycles — plan ahead, do not let effectors go dry simultaneously
Track data block: speed, altitude, heading, ETA to base

slides.title: Standards
content: Time to first engagement: initiated within 60 seconds of detection
Kill chain sequencing: zero ROE violations — no engagement before identification
NEXUS proficiency: correct 1/2→2/2 progression and defeat mode selection
Debrief: operator can explain each score category
